stemHtml: Two identical aeroplanes A and B, with the same mass, are flying steady level co-ordinated 20 degree bank turns. If the TAS of A is 130 kt and the TAS of B is 200 kt:

options.a: the turn radius of A is greater than that of B.
options.b: the lift coefficient of A is greater than that of B.
options.c: the rate of turn of A is less than that of B.
options.d: the load factor of A is greater than that of B.
